description: Add sophistication to your casual wardrobe with the Ragonese sneaker from rockport. This casual oxford has a full grain leather and suede upper for supple wear and stylish contrast. Padding in the collar and tongue reduces blisters and prevents lace bruising, as the Dynamic Suspension technology carries you with cushioned comfort. Upper Waxed suede upper with leather lining for added  strength and durability and natural look of the hide Light in weight for ultimate comfort in walking long distances Lace-up closure with padded collar for secure and comfortable Fit Padded tongue and collar to help protect from excessive  rubbing and prevent blisters Elongated lace vamp with perforated tongue for extra snug fit and added ventilation Midsole Moulded footbed made of polyurethane for long term  wear Shock absorbent cushioning to reduce foot fatigue Textile insole for ventilation and sweat absorption Strobel technology on the heel to provide cushioned  comfort for the feet, but is at the same time firm and  enhances support and flexibility to aid walking Outsole Rubber outsole with waffle pattern give dependable grip on a variety of surfaces Wash careUse a suede brush to dust off the dirtUse a suede shoe polish to make the shoes shineDo not store in direct sunlight
